description: Legal/official document in Arabic script. Drawn up in the majlis al-khidma of an amir with grand titles (...majd al-khilāfa ʿizz al-dīn jamāl al-umarāʾ fakhr al-mulk sayf al-dawla wa-[...]hā b. al-M[...]m ṣanīʿat amīr al-muʾminīn...). Dated: 26 Rabīʿ II 504 AH = 11 November 1110 CE. In which Rawʿ(?) b. Ḥammūd, a Muslim funduqānī (proprietor of a caravanserai), undertakes to transport to the Ṣināʿa ("the Arsenal"), the river port of Old Cairo, all falat (goods that had evaded the payment of dues) and all those for which customs had to be paid, whether they had been brought to his own place or to other caravanserais, or had otherwise come to his knowledge. Reused on recto for Hebrew poems. (Information in part from Goitein's note card and Med Soc I, 189–90.)
tags: customs, tax, funduq, DIMME, tax evasion
description_he: מסמך משפטי/רשמי בכתב ערבי ממג'לס אמיר. תאריך: 26 רביע ב' 504 היג'רה = 11 נובמבר 1110 לספירה. שבו מתחייב רוע ב. חמוד, פונדקאי מוסלמי, להעביר לנמל הנהר של קהיר הישנה כל סחורות שהשתמטו מתשלום מכס. בפנים שימוש חוזר לשירים עבריים
